name: Cherry Delight Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix and bake cake according to package directions in 9-inch cake pans. Cool completely.
2. In a bowl, combine confectioners sugar, softened cream cheese, and 3 tbsp. of Cool whip whipped topping. Blend well.
3. Spread half the mixture on the bottom layer of the cooled cake.
4. Spread half the cherry pie filling over the cream cheese mixture.
5. Place the top layer of the cake on the assembled layers.
6. Secure with toothpicks, if necessary.
7. Spread remaining cherry filling over all.
8. Blend the pudding mix with the remaining Cool whip topping, adding a small amount of milk if needed to achieve desired consistency.
9. Frost the sides of the cake and build a rim at the top of the cake to hold the remaining cherry pie filling.
